description: Adding measured throughput, GPU specs, and BFS completeness validation. The kernel validates completeness by tracking total_visited and continuing until frontier is empty; reaching exactly |SL₂(p)| elements confirms no early termination.
action_taken: Adding measured throughput, GPU specs, and BFS completeness validation. The kernel validates completeness by tracking total_visited and continuing until frontier is empty; reaching exactly |SL₂(p)| elements confirms no early termination.
